lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸੀਤਲੁ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tan man seetal jap naam teraa |
lines.english: My body and mind are cooled and soothed, chanting the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਤ ਢਹੈ ਦੁਖ ਡੇਰਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har har japat dtahai dukh dderaa |2|
lines.english: Meditating on the Lord, Har, Har, the house of pain is demolished. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so naam japai jo jan tudh bhaavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He alone is pleasing to Your Will, who chants the Naam. ||1||Pause||
The True Shabad of the Word of God is his trademark and insignia. ||3||
The Perfect Guru has implanted the Lord's Name within me.
He alone, who understands the Command of the Lord's Will, is approved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਨਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੮॥੫੯॥
lines.translit: bhanat naanak merai man sukh paaeaa |4|8|59|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, my mind has found peace. ||4||8||59||
Wherever You send me, there I go.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮੑਰੀ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਤੇ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਈਁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tumaree kripaa te tripat aghaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Your Grace, I am satisfied and satiated. ||1||Pause||
I am forever the chaylaa, the humble disciple, of the Lord of the Universe, the Sustainer of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਮ ਦੇਹੁ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jo tum dehu soee sukh paaee |1|
lines.english: Whatever You give me, brings me peace. ||1||
By Your Grace, O God, my life passes peacefully. ||2||
Whatever You give me, I wear and eat.
Deep within my mind and body, I meditate on You.
I recognize none as equal to You. ||3||
that I may be emancipated, clinging to the Feet of the Saints. ||4||9||60||
Says Nanak, this is my continual meditation:
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
Walking on the Way, sing the Praises of the Lord. ||1||
While standing up, and sitting down, and even while asleep, meditate on the Lord.
With your ears, listen to the Ambrosial Sermon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਸੁ ਸੁਨੀ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਅਨੰਦਾ ਦੂਖ ਰੋਗ ਮਨ ਸਗਲੇ ਲਥਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaas sunee man hoe anandaa dookh rog man sagale lathaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Listening to it, your mind shall be filled with bliss, and the troubles and diseases of your mind shall all depart. ||1||Pause||
By Guru's Grace, drink in the Ambrosial Essence of the Lord. ||2||
While you work at your job, on the road and at the beach, meditate and chant.
The humble being who sings the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, day and night,
One who does not forget the Lord, twenty-four hours a day, is emancipated;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਜਨੁ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਵਾਟ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so jan jam kee vaatt na paaeeai |3|
lines.english: does not have to go with the Messenger of Death. ||3||
Remembering Him in meditation, one abides in peace;
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਤਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਲਗਿ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੬੧॥
lines.translit: gat hovai naanak tis lag paaee |4|10|61|
lines.english: O Nanak, I fall at his feet. ||4||10||61||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਸਦ ਸਦਾ ਮਨਾਵਹੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur apanaa sad sadaa manaavahu |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Forever and ever, surrender to the True Guru. ||1||Pause||
one becomes happy, and suffering is ended. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦੁ ਕਰਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: anad karahu prabh ke gun gaavahu |
lines.english: Celebrate, make merry, and sing God's Glories.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਠੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਪਾਵਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: thir ghar baitthe prabh apanaa paavahu |2|
lines.english: Remain steady and stable within the home of your own self, and find God. ||2||
Act in accordance with the Shabad, the True Word of the True Guru.
Nanak knows this peace alone, night and day. ||4||11||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਤੰਤੁ ਮੰਤੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਨੑਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har tant mant gur deenaa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, is the Tantric exercise, and the Mantra, given by the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮ ਕਉ ਦੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਭਾਈ ਮੀਤ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tum kau dukh nahee bhaaee meet |3|
lines.english: and you shall not be troubled, O Siblings of Destiny, O friends. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰ ਕਾ ਬੁਰਾ ਨ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਚੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: par kaa buraa na raakhahu cheet |
lines.english: Do not harbor evil intentions against others in your mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਉਹੁ ਚਹੁ ਕੁੰਟ ਮਾਨੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam japat uhu chahu kuntt maanai |1|
lines.english: - chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he is honored in the four directions. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨੀਚ ਕਉ ਕੋਈ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis neech kau koee na jaanai |
lines.english: That wretched being, whom no one knows
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
I beg for the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan; please, give it to me, O Beloved!

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਉਨ ਕਉਨ ਨ ਤਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tumaree sevaa kaun kaun na taare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Serving You, who, who has not been saved? ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai nikatt na aavai koee |
lines.english: That person, whom no one wants to be near

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਆ ਕੇ ਚਰਨ ਮਲਿ ਧੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sagal srisatt uaa ke charan mal dhoee |2|
lines.english: - the whole world comes to wash the dirt of his feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਾਨੀ ਕਾਹੂ ਨ ਆਵਤ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jo praanee kaahoo na aavat kaam |
lines.english: That mortal, who is of no use to anyone at all
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the sleeping mind awakens.
Then, O Nanak, God seems sweet. ||4||12||63||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਜਪੀਐ ਨਾਮ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad taa ko japeeai naam |3|
lines.english: - by the Grace of the Saints, he meditates on the Naam. ||3||
Forever and ever, I contemplate the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||
With my eyes, I behold the One and Only Lord.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
